rationale: Reuses the existing single-resolution-point idiom (apply_host_cli_from_config, resolve_host()) and has a direct precedent for import-probe-and-downgrade (format_analysis_yaml). Option B has no precedent for try/except-and-retry-with-a-different-dispatcher and adds duplicate-call/state-mutation risk via the batch tracker.
alternatives_rejected: Option B — wrap _dispatch_live() call sites with pre-flight try/except
